prerequisites: A Drift account with access to your Drift organization.
A registered Drift app created in the Developer Center at dev.drift.com, which provides your OAuth client_id and client_secret.
OAuth scopes granted to the app (for example contact_read, conversation_read, user_read) covering the data you intend to read.
A completed OAuth authorization to obtain an access_token and refresh_token for your Drift organization.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0
authMethods.summary: Drift uses OAuth 2.0. Register an app in the Developer Center to get a client_id and client_secret, send the user through the authorization endpoint to receive an authorization code, then exchange that code at the token endpoint for an access_token and refresh_token. These four values map to the connector's credentials.client_id, credentials.client_secret, credentials.access_token, and credentials.refresh_token fields. The access_token expires (expires_in is returned), and the refresh_token is used to obtain a new one.

setupSteps.title: Create a Drift app in the Developer Center
setupSteps.body: Sign in at dev.drift.com and, under Your Apps, click Build Your App to create a new app. Add display information such as name, description, and icon. The app provides the client_id and client_secret used for OAuth.

setupSteps.title: Configure OAuth scopes
setupSteps.body: On the OAuth & Permissions page of your app, grant the scopes of access the app needs (for example contact_read, conversation_read, user_read). Only request the scopes required to read the data you plan to sync.

setupSteps.title: Authorize and obtain tokens
setupSteps.body: Redirect a user to https://dev.drift.com/authorize with response_type=code, your client_id, redirect_uri, and a state value. After approval, Drift redirects back with a code. Exchange it by POSTing to https://driftapi.com/oauth2/token with client_id, client_secret, code, and grant_type=authorization_code to receive an access_token and refresh_token.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the client_id, client_secret, access_token, and refresh_token into the connector's credentials field. Optionally set the email field to identify the Drift account. When the access_token expires, refresh it by POSTing to https://driftapi.com/oauth2/token with grant_type=refresh_token and your saved refresh_token.
